final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 小红书 cover image for a personal-media creator featuring a product review (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 素人 (authentic amateur) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9-grid layout (九高格) suitable for 小红书 cover format
Subject: must include the DJI Pocket 4 product prominently displayed
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a personal-media vibe — exact atmosphere is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" as central headline, font style must be cute and differentiated
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be 九高格 layout; must feature DJI Pocket 4 product; headline font must be cute and differentiated
Avoid:
